---
title: "Soft Sensors for Energy Consumption in<br>Topographic Uncertainty Propagation"
author: "Eren Edgü <br> Alan Correa"
institute: "Chair of Methods for Model-based Development in Computational Engineering"
date: "2026-06-01"
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format: 
  revealjs:
    center-title-slide: false
    theme: default
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
---

<style>
/* This shrinks the title text so it doesn't cover the whole slide */
.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block h1.title {
  font-size: 1.8em !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.5em;
}
/* This ensures the authors and institute have room */
.reveal .slides section.quarto-title-block .quarto-title-authors {
  font-size: 0.8em;
}
</style>

## Table of Contents
* [Introduction](#intro)
* [Motivation](#motivation)
* [Experimental Setup](#setup)
* [Preliminary Results](#results)
* [Conclusion](#conclusion)

## Introduction {#intro}
- What is topographic uncertainty propagation?
- Why is it important for flood simulations?
- Alumet Introduction

## Motivation
- Why measure energy directly?
- CPU time vs ALUMET attributed energy graph

## Experimental Setup {#setup}
- Alumet
- Synxflow
- Monte Carlo
- Ensemble analysis

## Preliminary Results {#results}

## Conclusion {#conclusion}
